concept.title: Best Practices for DITA Package Structure
concept.shortdesc: Use predictable map, topic, and media organization so migration plans remain stable across repeated runs.

ul.li: Maintain one clear main map per package.
Use map files to express navigation hierarchy, not file dump order.
Keep map references explicit and avoid hidden indirection.
Keep topic type semantics consistent with root element intent.
Use stable filenames and titles that support deterministic routing.
Separate reusable fragments from narrative topics.
Use package-relative paths for media references.
Avoid duplicate media names with different content.
Validate internal references after each structural refactor pass.

section.title: Operational best practice
section.p: Always run dry-run execution before apply mode and archive the execution report. This gives you a reproducible record when structure or plugin logic changes over time.
